text: Hello. Hello. Hey, good morning, James here from Nova HealthCare, Illinois. So to check whether you are eligible for this, may I know your age please? 98. Sorry, you don't seem to qualify for the benefit plans I have. Have a good day. [BLANK_AUDIO]
